name: Banana Cake Aloha Oe
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream shortening and sugar.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine bananas, soda, vanilla, and buttermilk. Mix in with the creamed mixture.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together. Add to the batter.
5. Pour into two greased 8-inch round cake pans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 45 minutes.
Banana Frosting:
1/2 cup Mashed bananas
1/2 teaspoon Lemon juice
1/4 cup Butter
3 1/2 cups Powdered sugar, sifted
1. Mix mashed bananas and lemon juice together.
2. Cream butter with 1 cup of powdered sugar.
3. Add banana mixture to the butter until it reaches a spreading consistency.
4. Add remaining powdered sugar and mix until smooth.
Source: Hawaiian Cuisine
From The Cookie Lady's Files MM by Cuz
